defects.summary: Support ticket subject summary omitted the shared `Demographic evidence` contact-domain field while patient routes rendered the full Phase 2 bundle.
defects.remediation: Added `Demographic evidence` to `Subject360SummaryPanel` so support matches the patient Phase 2 bridge and the shared contact-domain contract.
verification: 224 parity suite asserts the label on both patient and support surfaces

defects.summary: The shared Phase 2 kernel classified the support `controlled_resend` action route as `session_current` instead of the governed delivery-repair posture.
defects.remediation: Updated `deriveCauseClass` so `/ops/support/tickets/:supportTicketId/actions/controlled_resend` resolves to `repair_required` and can prove patient/support repair parity honestly.
verification: 224 parity suite compares callback repair and controlled resend routes
